session.name: i2i on all image models + full-fleet tier-2 workflow conversion (phase 1 of tier-1 deprecation)

goal.original: Add Image-to-Image to every image model that lacks it (like Krea2), and by end of session deprecate tier 1 entirely so nothing refers to tiers anymore — updating playbook, skills, docs, rules, and memory.
goal.summary: Phase 1 (workflows + i2i wiring) is DONE and committed on branch 1.2.0 across cd1b9780, b5c63796, 9574b974. The entire workflow fleet is now tier-2 (zero bare injected-target titles) and i2i is live on all 6 image models via the still-active bare-key alias. Phase 2 (the SENSITIVE code pass to actually drop tier-1 + coupled consumer updates + docs/rules/playbook/memory rewrite) is NOT started — handed off to a fresh session on purpose.

SDXL t2i/upscaler/detailer templates re-authored tier-2; generate_sdxl.py patched with _stamp_placeholder (Input_Image->placeholder.png) + _force_t2i_default (Input_Is_i2i->false); 15 SDXL runtimes regenerated

Full-fleet inventory confirms zero bare injected-target titles remain

pending: CODE PASS (sensitive — do with a live smoke test): update the title-based consumers FIRST while keeping the alias active, THEN drop the bare-key emit LAST

resizeInjector.js: FLIP_TITLE 'imageflip'->'input_flip_image', ROTATE_TITLE 'image rotate'->'input_rotate_image', FLIP_ENABLED_TITLE 'flip'->'input_flip' (lines 12-14). _requireNodes THROWS on mismatch, so resize/resizeVideo ops CRASH until this lands. HIGH PRIORITY.
commandExecutor.js mask matcher: lines 798 (=== 'detected') and 803 (=== 'output') must accept the new img_auto_mask titles Output_Detected / Output_image (accept both, or switch).

PromptBoxControls.js nodeTitle values still bare: line 673 'Auto_Grid'->'Input_Auto_Grid', 711 'Upscale_Factor'->'Input_Upscale_Factor', 773 'Denoise'->'Input_Denoise', 492 'Batch_Size'->'Input_Batch_Size', 534 'Duration'->'Input_Duration', 603 'Motion_Intensity'->'Input_Motion_Intensity'. Currently work via alias; update to canonical Input_ (or rely on alias — but the point is to remove the alias).

commandExecutor.js DROP the bare-key emit: lines 569-570 (Positive/Negative always emitted bare) change to Input_Positive/Input_Negative; lines 725-739 alias pass — remove the bare half so only Input_* is emitted. THIS IS THE RISKY EDIT — do it LAST, after the above, then live-smoke every op on every model family.
commandExecutor.js capture path lines 1289-1301: simplify the tier-2 image/video capture 'alias' framing (it is now the only naming, not an alias).
models.js: remove the `tier` field from all models (lines 215/295/382/439/507 tier:2, line 560 wan22-5b tier:1). Grep consumers: projectMigrations.js:213 references per-model tier — update/remove.

DOCS/RULES/PLAYBOOK/MEMORY rewrite (needs approval for architectural rule files per CLAUDE.md): .claude/rules/comfy_injection.md (drop the two-tier naming law, make Input_*/Output_* the single law), docs/comfy.md (standard title map), docs/add-model-playbook.md (tier language), feedback_comfy_node_naming_law memory, project_comfy_injection_silent_title_skip memory. Check MEMORY.md for tier refs.

next_action.description: Start the sensitive code pass. Do it in this order to keep a safety net: (1) resizeInjector.js 3 title constants (it THROWS if unmatched — resize is broken until fixed), (2) commandExecutor mask matcher accept Output_Detected/Output_image, (3) PromptBoxControls nodeTitle values -> Input_*, (4) LAST drop the bare-key emit (commandExecutor 569-570 + 725-739) and live-smoke every op on every model family, (5) remove models.js tier field + projectMigrations consumer, (6) get user approval then rewrite docs/rules/playbook/memory to make Input_*/Output_* the single naming law. The bare-key alias is currently ACTIVE so everything works today — do not drop it until 1-3 are done and verified.

key_decisions: i2i shares the t2i graph switched by injected Input_Is_i2i boolean (Krea2 pattern) — models.js maps i2i to the same t2i json; no commandRegistry change (op already exists, components capability-gated).

generate scripts MUST force Input_Is_i2i->false and Input_Image->placeholder.png on every runtime, because a template exported mid-i2i-test bakes true / a real test image; a baked true would run every plain t2i as i2i.

Combined MpiSaveVideo (Output_Video, audio embedded) needs NO capture-code change — the existing output_video matcher already handles it; the split Output_Audio path just goes dormant for those 3 workflows.

User decided to LEAVE bare Positive/Negative CLIP nodes in sdxl_upscaler + sdxl_detailer templates (they are internal, link-fed by Input_Positive; harmless once the bare emit is dropped since they will no longer be injection targets). Do NOT rename them.
The bare 'Duration' node is MpiWanSeconds (a frames/seconds/fps converter), NOT app-injected — app injects Input_Duration (MpiInt). Never flag bare Duration as a violation.
Sequencing chosen by user: commit the tier-2 workflows FIRST as a stable bisectable checkpoint (done), then the code pass as its own commit(s) in a FRESH session.
constraints: SHARED TREE: never git add -A / git add . — stage by explicit pathspec. A peer session had MpiPromptBox/PromptBoxControls/MpiDropdown/commandRegistry/dependencies modified at session start; verify before touching PromptBoxControls.js that your hunks don't collide.

The injector matches node title EXACTLY (comfyController.js:1159-1163 title.toLowerCase() === key.toLowerCase()) — no prefix magic. Silent-skip trap (MPI-242): a param whose title matches nothing is DROPPED with no error. This is exactly why dropping the bare emit is risky.

resizeInjector _requireNodes THROWS (loud) on a missing title — so a resize title mismatch crashes rather than silent-skips. Good, but means resize/resizeVideo are BROKEN between the workflow rename (already shipped) and the injector-const fix (pending). Fix resizeInjector FIRST.

RunPod/remote != local-engine proof: any engine-path behavior must be considered for BOTH engines (feedback_check_both_engine_paths). The injector/capture code is shared, so it covers both, but confirm.
Chroma_upscaler.json + all 6 utility workflows are RUNTIME files with no template/script — they are hand-authored, so changes go straight into comfy_workflows/<name>.json (no regen).
Do NOT edit architectural rule files (.claude/rules/*) without explicit user approval (CLAUDE.md CARDINAL RULE 3).
files_modified: comfy_workflows/t2i_sdxl_realistic.json (+ 4 sibling t2i, 5 upscaler, 5 detailer SDXL runtimes)
comfy_workflows/image_upscale.json, video_upscale.json, resize.json, resize_video.json, video_interpolate.json, img_auto_mask.json

resume_prompt: You are resuming the tier-1 deprecation work on Cubric Vision (branch 1.2.0). Phase 1 is DONE and committed (cd1b9780, b5c63796, 9574b974): every workflow in the fleet is now tier-2 (Input_*/Output_* on all app-touched nodes) and Image-to-Image is live on all 6 image models (5 SDXL + Chroma) via the still-active bare-key alias in commandExecutor. Your job is Phase 2, the sensitive code pass that actually removes tier 1. Read .agents/mpi-kanban/state/handoffs/f4fd96e2-a4cd-444b-adf4-47cb05039c80.json and MPI-252's task.json/events.jsonl, then run mpi-continue. Do the code edits in this exact order so a safety net stays up: (1) resizeInjector.js lines 12-14 rename FLIP_TITLE/ROTATE_TITLE/FLIP_ENABLED_TITLE to input_flip_image/input_rotate_image/input_flip — it THROWS on mismatch so resize/resizeVideo are BROKEN until this lands, do it first; (2) commandExecutor.js mask matcher lines 798/803 accept Output_Detected/Output_image; (3) PromptBoxControls.js nodeTitle values (Auto_Grid/Upscale_Factor/Denoise/Batch_Size/Duration/Motion_Intensity) -> Input_ canonical; (4) LAST, drop the bare-key emit in commandExecutor lines 569-570 and the alias pass 725-739, then LIVE-SMOKE every op on every model family before committing; (5) remove the models.js tier field on all models + its projectMigrations.js:213 consumer; (6) get explicit user approval, then rewrite .claude/rules/comfy_injection.md, docs/comfy.md, docs/add-model-playbook.md and the two naming-law memory files to make Input_*/Output_* the single law. Constraints: shared tree — stage by explicit pathspec, never git add . ; a peer may have unstaged hunks in PromptBoxControls.js, check before editing; the injector matches titles EXACTLY (no prefix magic) so a mismatch silently drops the param — that is why the bare emit is dropped LAST. Also still pending: live-test the i2i op in-app on one SDXL model + Chroma (coded + graph-verified, not live-verified). MPI-252 tracks all of this.
